item.title: JPercyTelegraph: John Percy @JPercyTelegraph · 1min #nffc to undergo a big overhaul of their football operations this summer, regardless
item.description: John Percy @JPercyTelegraph · 1min #nffc to undergo a big overhaul of their football operations this summer, regardless of whether they avoid relegation. Global head of football Edu Gaspar is set to leave while Craig Mulholland, head of football development, is joining the Scottish FA as chief football officer 3 3 34 826

item.title: TheAthleticFC: The Athletic | Football @TheAthleticFC · 1min Javier Mascherano has left Inter Miami after 67 matches in charge and one
item.description:
The Athletic | Football @TheAthleticFC · 1min Javier Mascherano has left Inter Miami after 67 matches in charge and one MLS Cup title.
For the American football world, the announcement was a shock.
But if you’ve been following Inter Miami since its origins, the news shouldn’t surprise you.
@FelipeCar
Mostrar más 3 3 13 932
